name: Aluminium ladder 7 step
description:
Durable and Tough Build: Steps made with ultra-sturdy industrial aluminium and PP for dependable strength, rust resistance and long-lasting use.
Stable Step Design: Wide ribbed steel steps, a rectangular-section frame, and a strong handgrip work together to provide firm footing, improved balance, and steady support even under heavy use.
Secure Floor Grip: Reinforced nylon webbing adds firmness, PVC anti-scratch shoes improve grip and protect floors, and double-locking pro hinges prevent jiggling even under heavy load.
Easy Reach & Storage: The flat-fold design lets you store the ladder easily, while its 7 steps give you comfortable height access for everyday tasks without using extra space.
120 kg Load Support: Despite its light weight, it confidently supports up to 120 kg.
Reliable Performance Tested: Built with weather-resistant strength and verified through international lab testing and vigorous stress checks to ensure durability, endurance, and long-term reliability.
Lightweight Portability: A super-lightweight build and a 8.3 kg body make it easy to lift, carry, and move around your home without compromising on overall stability and support.

specifications.Application: Home, shop, warehouse, maintenance and industrial access work

box_contents: 7 step ladder
